briefing: Markets pulled back today with NASDAQ down 1.1% and S&P 500 down 0.5%, putting us in risk-off mode with no new candidates screened. We're holding all 6 existing positions and keeping the $777 cash on the sidelines rather than forcing a buy into weakness.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-off' day is when investors broadly sell higher-risk assets like growth stocks and move toward safety, often causing indices like NASDAQ to fall more than the broader S&P 500. The right response is usually to hold existing positions and avoid chasing new trades until conditions stabilize, rather than trying to catch a falling knife.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險」（Risk-Off）是指投資人普遍拋售成長股等高風險資產、轉向較安全的資產，這通常會讓納斯達克等指數跌幅大於標普500等大盤指數。正確的做法通常是持有現有部位並避免追逐新交易，直到市況穩定，而不是急於「接刀子」進場抄底。

market_education.summary_en: Broad equity indices declined today, with tech-heavy NASDAQ underperforming the S&P 500, a pattern typically seen when investors rotate out of higher-risk growth names during periods of uncertainty. No specific news catalyst was provided in today's screen, so the move appears to reflect broader risk-off sentiment rather than a single company-specific event. In these conditions, our screener correctly returned no qualifying candidates, since momentum-based buy signals are unreliable during broad market pullbacks.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤普遍下跌，科技股為主的納斯達克指數跌幅（-1.1%）大於標普500指數（-0.5%），這種走勢通常反映投資人在不確定時期減碼高風險成長股。今日並無提供具體新聞事件作為觸發因素，顯示這次下跌較可能反映整體避險情緒而非個別公司消息。在這種市況下，選股系統未篩選出任何合格標的是正確的，因為動能買入訊號在大盤回檔期間可信度較低。
